# terrible_community_general_rhsm_repository (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The ID of repositories to enable. To operate on several repositories this can accept a comma separated list or a YAML list.

### Optional

- `purge` (Boolean) Disable all currently enabled repositories that are not not specified in `name`. Only set this to `true` if passing in a list of repositories to the `name` field. Using this with `loop` is likely not to have the desired result.
- `state` (String) If state is equal to present or disabled, indicates the desired repository state. In community.general 10.0.0 the states `present` and `absent` have been removed. Please use `enabled` and `disabled` instead.

### Read-Only

- `repositories` (String) The list of RHSM repositories with their states. When this module is used to change the repository states, this list contains the updated states after the changes.
